headline: Stock Futures Slide With Markets on Edge Ahead of Big Tech Earnings
summary: Stocks were on course to open a touch lower on Monday, with investors seemingly reluctant to make any major moves ahead of a slew of Big Tech earnings and a Federal Reserve interest-rate decision.  S&P 500 futures slipped 0.1% and contracts tied to the tech-heavy Nasdaq 100 were flat.  Both the S&P and the Nasdaq hit record closing highs at the end of last week, powered higher by Intel and other chip stocks.

content.title: Stock Futures Slide With Markets on Edge Ahead of Big Tech Earnings
content.summary: Stocks were on course to open a touch lower on Monday, with investors seemingly reluctant to make any major moves ahead of a slew of Big Tech earnings and a Federal Reserve interest-rate decision.  S&P 500 futures slipped 0.1% and contracts tied to the tech-heavy Nasdaq 100 were flat.  Both the S&P and the Nasdaq hit record closing highs at the end of last week, powered higher by Intel and other chip stocks.

headline: Google DeepMind Teams Up With South Korea on AI Research Drive
summary: Google DeepMind (NASDAQ:GOOG) has formed a partnership with South Korea to support the country’s K-Moonshot initiative, a programme focused on applying artificial intelligence to tackle complex scientific problems, according to the nation’s Science and ICT Ministry. The collaboration spans several disciplines, including life sciences, meteorology and climate research, with both sides set to exchange AI models, tools and scientific datasets.

content.title: Google DeepMind Teams Up With South Korea on AI Research Drive
content.summary: Google DeepMind (NASDAQ:GOOG) has formed a partnership with South Korea to support the country’s K-Moonshot initiative, a programme focused on applying artificial intelligence to tackle complex scientific problems, according to the nation’s Science and ICT Ministry. The collaboration spans several disciplines, including life sciences, meteorology and climate research, with both sides set to exchange AI models, tools and scientific datasets.

headline: Dow Futures Slide With Markets on Edge Ahead of Big Tech Earnings
summary: Stocks were wavering on Monday, with investors seemingly reluctant to make any major moves ahead of a slew of Big Tech earnings and a Federal Reserve interest-rate decision.  S&P 500 futures slipped 0.1% and contracts tied to the tech-heavy Nasdaq 100 were up 0.1%.  Both the S&P and the Nasdaq hit record closing highs at the end of last week, powered higher by Intel and other chip stocks.

content.title: Dow Futures Slide With Markets on Edge Ahead of Big Tech Earnings
content.summary: Stocks were wavering on Monday, with investors seemingly reluctant to make any major moves ahead of a slew of Big Tech earnings and a Federal Reserve interest-rate decision.  S&P 500 futures slipped 0.1% and contracts tied to the tech-heavy Nasdaq 100 were up 0.1%.  Both the S&P and the Nasdaq hit record closing highs at the end of last week, powered higher by Intel and other chip stocks.
